2026-04-22T21:15:42.7641518Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-22T21:15:42.7643034Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-22T21:15:42.7643838Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-22T21:15:42.7644414Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
